allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; reviews=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r.get\('path',''\), r.get\('line',''\), r.get\('body',''\)[:500]\) for r in reviews]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json comments = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for c in comments: print\(f'--- {c[\\"user\\"][\\"login\\"]} on {c[\\"path\\"]}:{c.get\(\\"line\\",\\"\\"\)} ---'\) print\(c['body'][:600]\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import jupyter_server; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(jupyter_server.serverapp.ServerApp\); lines = [l for l in src.split\('\\n'\) if 'stop_extension' in l or 'stop_app' in l or 'SIGINT' in l or 'signal' in l.lower\(\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(lines[:30]\)\)")
